appraisal_events.evidence: « demande-lui de ne pas aller à la voiture... si on demandait le marquis de Robert de Saint-Loup, on dise qu'on ne le connaissait pas. » La voiture repartit bientôt.
appraisal_events.explanation: Robert orchestrates an avoidance of his uncle by having staff refuse contact and deny knowing him, resulting in Charlus departing without entering.

status_effects.explanation: He is actively excluded and denied access/recognition, leading to his departure.
